creator: zeising@daemonic.se
text:
It is related to the work with switching glut implementation in FreeBSD. 
  See the heads up i sent out during the weekend for details about that. 
  The new glut implementation, freeglut, does not pull in the same 
dependencies as the old libglut, so some will be missing when building 
the port, and it fails to build.
Regards!
-- 
Niclas
